content: Task bootstrap for meeting transcript segmentation. Capability focus: Recent Constraint Tracking.
Extract 3 segments from the meeting transcript using latest time windows in this thread.
All segments must be labeled with topic tags, speaker info. Files: segment_01.txt/segment_02.txt/segment_03.txt.
Legacy script uses different topic labels; left for historical reference only.
Time windows updated: use latest set from turn 6 onward and ignore previous trial windows.
Temporary side task: count total speaking time per participant, then resume segmentation.
Source A says keep original topic names. Source B says enforce standardized topic tags.
Final reminder: validate segment boundaries and speaker coverage before finalizing.

MEETING_TRANSCRIPT:
[00:00-05:30] Alice,Bob: Project kickoff and timeline discussion
[05:30-12:15] Alice,Carol,David: Technical architecture review and API design
[12:15-18:45] Bob,David: Database schema optimization and caching strategy
[18:45-25:20] Alice,Carol: User interface mockups and accessibility requirements
[25:20-32:00] Bob,Carol,David: Testing strategy and deployment pipeline
[32:00-38:30] Alice,Bob,David: Budget allocation and resource planning
[38:30-42:00] All: Action items and next steps

SEGMENT_RULES:
Segment 1: First technical discussion (technical architecture)
Segment 2: Implementation details (database + UI)
Segment 3: Planning and wrap-up (testing + budget + action items)
